summary: Validated folio-open write-path migration for Strangler Fig pattern. All 7 backend tests pass (happy path, idempotency, validation, tenant isolation). Frontend smoke test confirmed app loads, login works with demo admin credentials, and dashboard displays correctly with no blank/white screen.
features_tested: POST /api/folio/create happy path - opens new folio through semantic service ✅
Idempotency - same key returns same folio ✅
Idempotency - different key after folio exists returns 409 ✅
Wrong tenant cannot access other tenant's bookings (404) ✅
Outbox event folio.opened.v1 created with expected payload ✅
Dashboard displays AI Daily Briefing, stats cards, analytics charts ✅
critical_code_review_comments: OpenFolioService properly implements idempotency with request hash comparison
Tenant isolation enforced via build_tenant_context and booking lookup filtering
Property scope validation correctly rejects mismatched x-property-id headers
Outbox events and audit logs created atomically within the transaction flow
Response contract preserved with expected fields (id, tenant_id, booking_id, folio_number, folio_type, status, guest_id, company_id, balance, notes, created_at, closed_at)
seed_data_creation: Tests create their own test data (companies, bookings) and use existing demo tenant guests/rooms
context_for_next_testing_agent: Folio-open semantic service migration tested and validated. All write-path tests pass including happy path with outbox event (folio.opened.v1) and audit log (folio_opened) creation. Idempotency correctly implemented with request hash comparison. Tenant/property isolation enforced. Frontend smoke confirmed working. Next iteration could test charge post/payment/refund/invoice flows when ready for migration.
